query:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.company, c.linkedin, c.linkedinProfileUrl, c.contactTrustTier,
       p.name as projectName, p.priority
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE c.contactTrustTier != 'send_ready'
  AND (c.linkedin IS NOT NULL OR c.linkedinProfileUrl IS NOT NULL)
  AND (c.name LIKE '% _.' OR c.name REGEXP '^[A-Z][a-z]+ [A-Z]\\.$')
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
ORDER BY p.priority, p.name
LIMIT 30;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.company, c.linkedin, c.linkedinProfileUrl, c.contactTrustTier,
       p.name as projectName, p.priority
FROM contacts c
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE c.contactTrustTier != 'send_ready'
  AND (c.linkedin IS NOT NULL OR c.linkedinProfileUrl IS NOT NULL)
  AND (c.name LIKE '% _.' OR c.name REGEXP '^[A-Z][a-z]+ [A-Z]\\.$')
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
ORDER BY p.priority, p.name
LIMIT 30;
